title: SRCxSeyit Boxpvp Pack
description: Mainly Elytrapvp Texturepack focusly better pvp and better game experience. Texturepack have a better fps boost and simple blocks, custom items for boxpvpv. Custom Glint for better visuals and better sounds.
body:
- No particles: Removes particles from the game.
- Small totem: Makes the totem of undying smaller.
- Small items: Makes the items smaller.
- Better anchor and crystal: Improves the appearance of the anchor and end crystals(3D End crystal).
- Better Elytra and gap: Improves the appearance of the elytra and gapple for better pvp.
- Small bows and swords: Reduces the size of bows and swords.
- Symbolized guis: Adds symbols to the graphical user interfaces (GUIs/Potions).
- Simplified armors: Makes the armors look simpler.
- Better crosshair: Enhances the crosshair in the game.
- Better Font: Different font for better fps.
- Better FPS: 16x16 Blocks for better fps.
- Custom Sounds: Custom hit sound/Critical sound.
- Mainly Elytra pvp Texturepack
